title: Bare Bones - Classic Edition
description: A fork of Bare Bones that changes some of the textures to resemble the Programmer Art resource pack.
body:
This resource pack edits various textures included within the Bare Bones resource pack to better resemble Minecraft's pre 1.14 textures for those who prefer that.
Requires the Bare Bones resource pack to be enabled, place this pack above it when using.


If you find any issues or have any suggestions, my discord username is "darkral."
